# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?

## How was it tested?

> **Note:** Complete only the checks applicable to the current development stage. Documentation-only PRs or early phases may skip compilation checks.

- [ ] `cargo build` / `cargo clippy` / `cargo fmt` pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested in QEMU (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] No new `unsafe` without a `// SAFETY:` comment
- [ ] I can explain the invariant this code relies on
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing change)
